prestazioni: AMG M158 6.0L V12 Biturbo (engine code) upgraded with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (86mm compressor wheels, 106mm turbine wheels) and custom titanium wastegates with 3D-printed Inconel 718 turbine housings for 1,200+ HP on E85 fuel, paired with a Weistec Engineering billet aluminum crankshaft and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods with ARP L19 hardware

Full titanium exhaust system by Capristo (4.5-inch diameter, Inconel 625 headers, and quad 100mm carbon fiber tips) with electronically controlled butterfly valves for backpressure optimization, integrated with a Pagani-specific Motec M150 ECU running custom lambda-based fueling maps

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and Pagani-specific titanium spring perches, paired with a full carbon fiber monoblock subframe reinforcement kit by Novitec Torado for chassis rigidity under extreme lateral loads
estetica: Full carbon fiber 'Tempesta' aerodynamic package by Pagani Automobili (active front splitter with hydraulic actuation, rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flaps, and a 3D-printed titanium rear wing with adjustable angle of attack via hydraulic rams)

Custom 'Bespoke Carbon Weave' exterior finish by Pagani's in-house atelier, featuring a multi-layered 'Liquid Silver' tinted clear coat with embedded micro-flakes of 24K gold, applied over a carbon fiber weave with a 1x1 twill pattern for maximum depth and reflectivity

Forged magnesium OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (20x9.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear) and paired with Pagani-specific Brembo GT-R monoblock calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with carbon-ceramic rotors (420mm front, 380mm rear) featuring directional cooling vanes
